UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile and progress in the app.

uid.description: The user's unique ID from Firebase Authentication.

avatarUrl.description: URL for the user's avatar image.

points.description: Total points earned by the user.

highestQuizStreak.description: Highest quiz streak achieved in the Pomodoro timer.

completedSessions.description: Total number of Pomodoro sessions completed.

unlockedThemes.description: List of theme names the user has unlocked.

activeTheme.description: The currently active theme for the user.

unlockedPets.description: List of pet names the user has unlocked.

petNames.description: A map of original pet names to user-given nicknames.

dailyProgress.description: A map of daily progress, with dates as keys.

lastLogin.description: The last login date of the user.

lastChallengeDate.description: The date the last daily challenge was completed.

passingScore.description: The user's preferred passing score for challenges.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.
